evals.prompt: Render evals/sample/deck-sample.md to the claudecode-deck template (the skill renders ONE template and ONE company per run).
evals.expected_output: Exactly one 16:9 PDF for the single selected template, with the hand-written raw SVG diagram embedded, no raw ```d2 text, brand styling applied, and the company selected from the profile shown in the footer.
assertions: exactly one PDF is produced (the skill renders a single template per run)
the PDF page size is 1440 x 810 pts (16:9)
the PDF embeds at least one image (the raw SVG diagram)
no PDF text layer contains the literal '```d2' or 'direction: right'
the selected company name from the profile appears in the PDF footer

evals.prompt: Make a polished handbook PDF from evals/sample/handbook-sample.md.
evals.expected_output: A 6.5x9.25in LaTeX book PDF with a cover, dotted-leader Contents, chapter openers, callout cards, a pull quote, and the raw SVG diagram as a figure.
assertions: PDF page size is 468 x 666 pts (6.5x9.25in book trim)
PDF embeds the raw SVG figure and no raw '```d2' leaks
a Contents page with dotted leaders is present

evals.prompt: Render evals/sample/bgn-deck-sample.md to the bgn-deck template (the skill renders ONE template and ONE company per run).
evals.expected_output: A bgn-deck slide PDF matching the BGN brand (navy/green/gold, BGN Sans + Lora) with a cover, a big-stat, a KPI slide, the alur-operasional diagram on a split slide, and a closing.
assertions: PDF page size is 1440 x 810 pts
no raw d2 leaks (no '```d2' or 'direction:' in the PDF text); the alur-operasional diagram is embedded as an image
